{{CargoRelic
|name=Figaro Marriage
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=11-01
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Nov 1, 1784, Mozart wrote the greatest opera he ever composed.

He spent a year writing "The Marriage of Figaro" which premiered at the Vienna Operahouse. It was a masterpiece containing great music, well-rounded character development, and dramatic interactions. Such a wonderful story had only made the Austrian king yawn once as he was enjoying the 4-hour opera.

[Classic Quotes]

When a dog bites a man, that is not news, but if a man bites a dog, that is news.<br>You deserve what you have done.<br>Praise is meaningless if one is not allowed to criticize.<br>If there is no God, make one.
|fame=42
|art=75
|fth=46
|civ=35
|tech=45
|ss1=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss2=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail DEF +4<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss3=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail DEF +5<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss4=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +7<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail DEF +7<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss5=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail DEF +9<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss7=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail DEF +9<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hellas skill II.png|50px]] Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, 2x Blue Card Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Hellas skill II.png|50px]] Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +7.5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Purple ART Relics]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Reagent Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Mirage Gems]]
